subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, there is none other God but Him. His is all creation and command, and unto Him do all return. Indeed have all things borne witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم انه ما من اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر و کل الیه راجعون قد شهدت الاشیاء
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @purpose; goal of creation
